checksDetail.detail: Only the small public resources manifest stays preloaded.
Resource, 181103, manifest, and auth JSON loads are settled in parallel.
Search and category filter controls have persistent accessible names.
Source/private-video status panel is an atomic polite status region.
Resource grids expose busy state while loading and clear it after render/error.
Video/document cards guard long titles and descriptions on narrow screens.
Repeated cards do not reserve compositor layers with persistent will-change.

acceptance.meaning: Round307 resources page avoids head-preloading heavy 181103 JSON, loads resource metadata in parallel, exposes status/busy state, and guards long labels on mobile.
